original_prompt: 给这个首饰套装做一张亚马逊a+
optimized_prompt:
[Visual Description]
Macro photography focusing on the central pear-cut focal stone of the tiara from the 3-piece bridal jewelry set. The image highlights the intricate silver filigree work and the brilliance of the dense pave-set round crystals surrounding the main gem. The background is a soft, out-of-focus creamy silk or satin texture to emphasize the premium quality. Lighting is studio-grade, creating sharp specular highlights on the cubic zirconia facets.

[Text & UI Layout]
***Layout Style**: Feature Highlight (Amazon A+ Standard).
Text Rendering Instructions (Use English for Text):
1. **Feature Header**: Content: "Exquisite Craftsmanship". Style: [Elegant, Serif Font like Playfair Display, Dark Charcoal].
2. **Benefit**: Content: "Hand-set crystals for maximum brilliance". Style: [Clean Sans-serif, smaller size, Light Grey].
Graphically, include a thin, elegant line pointing specifically to the large central teardrop gem to draw attention to the cut precision.
layout_logic: Since this is for Amazon A+, the focus should be on 'perceived value' and 'detail'. Zooming in on the central stone of the tiara (the most prominent piece) establishes quality. The text should be placed in the negative space (the blurred silk background) to ensure readability. Using a serif font for the header adds a touch of bridal elegance.
